success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Low-intrusiveness import-based adapter strategy matched repository characteristics (import_feasibility=0.92, risk=low).
MCP plugin runtime health check passed (service_health=healthy, transport=stdio), indicating deployable baseline service.
Repository structure and dependencies were detected correctly (pyproject.toml + setup.py + requirements.txt), enabling generation without blocking dependency gaps.
Meaningful endpoint set was identified from high-value QuTiP APIs (operators, states, solvers, visualization).
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed (non-blocking), reducing external semantic enrichment for generation/review.
Original project test result is marked passed=false with empty details and execution_time=0, suggesting tests were not actually executed despite reported 100% coverage metadata.
Plugin generation telemetry is inconsistent (tool_endpoints=0 and total_lines_of_code=0 while endpoint list and files exist), indicating instrumentation/reporting defect.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully via zip fallback; exact node timing unavailable, but download did not become a blocker.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed with medium complexity classification and risk scoring; DeepWiki sub-step failed but local/LLM-direct analysis succeeded.
node_performance.generation_time: Completed quickly enough within total 225.27s and produced expected MCP file set; however generation metrics reporting appears incomplete.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin health test passed; original project tests appear skipped or unreported, limiting confidence in functional correctness.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown from telemetry (reported 0 MB). Current metrics are insufficient; likely acceptable for generation phase but unverified for solver runtime workloads.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown from telemetry (reported 0%). Cannot assess real compute efficiency without runtime profiling on mesolve/mcsolve-heavy calls.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low additional footprint from generated MCP files; repository itself is moderate-to-large with many tests/docs. No disk pressure indicators observed.
